item.title: Stress Test - Tacit Knowledge Rules in Clinical Psychology
item.description: Stress Test: Tacit Knowledge Rules in Clinical Psychology / Therapy Seed Rules Being Tested Rule: For domains where experiential knowledge is essential, include experiential-component frontmatter indicating what aspects require direct experience to fully understand.

item.title: Seed Stress Test - Experiential Knowledge Rule (Cross-Domain Analysis)
item.description: Seed Stress Test: Experiential Knowledge Rule (Cross-Domain Analysis) Testing: The “experiential knowledge” rule across multiple domains: meditation, pottery, and clinical practice Domain: Multi-domain (Meditation, Crafts, Medicine) The Rule Under Test Rule: For domains where experiential knowledge ...

item.title: Seed Stress Test - Brewing Knowledge Base
item.description: Seed Stress Test: Brewing Knowledge Base Testing Seed rules against beer brewing — a craft domain combining procedural knowledge, scientific principles, and sensory evaluation.

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Molecular and Structural Knowledge Representation
item.description: Frontier Exploration - Molecular and Structural Knowledge Representation The Gap The Seed covers: Text-based knowledge capture Visual literacy for creative domains (photography, design) Sensory knowledge with reference standards Multi-modal knowledge (general) But it does NOT fully cover: Molecular/...

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Learning Resource Knowledge
item.description: Frontier Exploration: Learning Resource Knowledge The Gap The Seed covers many knowledge types: factual, procedural, conceptual, temporal, probabilistic, troubleshooting, etc.

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Knowledge Applicability Boundaries
item.description: Frontier Exploration - Knowledge Applicability Boundaries Capturing when knowledge doesn’t apply — the inverse of scope tags The Problem The Seed covers: Scope tags (jurisdiction:, hardiness-zone:, expertise-level:) — when knowledge APPLIES Trade-off knowledge — choosing between options Contradictor...

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Musical Arrangement Knowledge
item.description: Frontier Exploration: Musical Arrangement Knowledge The Gap The Seed distinguishes: Linear-sequential knowledge: fixed order (history, recipes) Iterative-evaluative knowledge: decision loops where next steps depend on evaluating current state (design, writing) But there’s a third category the Seed d...

item.title: Handling Temporal Knowledge
item.description: Handling Temporal and Outdated Knowledge Knowledge that changes over time requires different treatment than static knowledge.

item.title: AI-Assisted Knowledge Management Seed
item.description: AI-Assisted Knowledge Management Seed Drop this file into any vault to bootstrap a healthy, self-improving knowledge base.

item.title: CLAUDE
item.description: AI-Assisted Knowledge Management Vault Purpose This vault develops and refines a universal “Seed” — a portable ruleset that lets an AI agent build a high-quality knowledge base on ANY topic from scratch.
